title: Atlassian Design System Accessibility
summary: Atlassian's foundation-level accessibility guidance for inclusive design, content, and component implementation.
lessons: Define accessibility responsibilities across design, engineering, and content workflows.
caveats: Component guidance does not replace testing complete product journeys with assistive technologies.
licenseNote: Public first-party documentation; cite and synthesize.
antiImitationNote: Adopt cross-functional practices, not Atlassian product styling.
